items.name: BURBERRY LOLA BAG - NIMBUS 3.0
items.description:
Embrace the great outdoors with Burberry’s limited-edition Lola bag – Nimbus. Surrounded by floating clouds that echo the style’s classic quilting, this virtual bag is calming and ethereal. 
Item created for 3.0 humanoid avatar.

items.name: BURBERRY LOLA BAG - REFLEX 3.0
items.description:
Let your light shine with Reflex – a mirrored take on Burberry’s Lola bag. This limited-edition style features a reflective mirrored surface and chain strap, while floating Thomas Burberry Monogram hardware frames the silhouette. 
Item created for 3.0 humanoid avatar.

items.name: GRAMMY Shoulder Bag
items.description: Show off your style with this cool chrome bag.

items.name: BURBERRY LOLA BAG - GEM 3.0
items.description: Cut with a glistening jewel-like facade, Gem is a charismatic and confident virtual Lola bag that features a polished Thomas Burberry Monogram and coordinating chain strap.

items.name: BURBERRY LOLA BAG - BLOOM 3.0
items.description:
Delicate yet strong – Bloom sees Burberry’s Lola bag intertwined with roses around the chain strap and style’s signature Thomas Burberry Monogram, while butterflies flutter serenely alongside. 
Item created for 3.0 humanoid avatar.
